name: SImon.sitimefracSouth30
title: Fraction of Time Steps with Sea Ice
description: Fraction of time steps of the averaging period during which sea ice is present (siconc > 0) in a grid cell.
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of SImon.sitimefracSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
